data.name: 萬鬼夜行
data.detailed_description:
◆特點


◇從被人類和獸人插入到被觸手、植物、肉體的尾巴侵犯的HCG應有盡有
◇戰鬥中立繪將會根據敵人的攻擊而逐漸改變
◇主角山櫻夏乃(cv御子柴 泉)戰鬥過程全語音 !
◇含快進動畫等簡便的操作系統

◆遊戲說明


這是一款正統的RPG游戲，你可以在遊戲內提升等級、存錢和購買新裝備，系統也非常簡單，你可以直接從地圖上的物品欄中直接使用恢復物品等......。
因為主要享受的是失敗時的H場景，所以敵人會相較強大，所需的戰鬥量也會比較少。

游戲的設計很親切，敵人是採取基礎的接觸即開始戰鬥模式，所以必須與他們觸碰到才會開始戰鬥，也可以小心避開。
然而，如果不小心開始戰鬥，則有很大的可能會失敗......並且觀看到精彩的H場面!

在戰鬥中，目標會不斷受到性騷擾並且展現出不同的立繪。
而受到H攻擊時隨著快樂程度的增加，同時受到的傷害也會增加，你的HP則會更容易下降。

當你的HP歸0時，你將被插入射精，但是作為代替HP和NP將會被恢復。
當子宮內充滿精子時，游戲就結束了。

快來一起享受精彩的戰鬥演出吧!!

◆操作說明


◇基本操作：
箭頭與角色的移動（可以斜著移動）：方向鍵、左鍵點擊、WASD鍵。
決定：Z鍵、Enter鍵、左鍵、空格鍵 。
取消：X鍵，右鍵。

◇地圖場景：
顯示選單和狀態畫面：在地圖場景中使用X鍵或右鍵點擊。
你還可以在選單的選項中調整音量和選擇難度等級。
你可以使用在村莊和地牢的水晶進行戰鬥中H場景等相關設定的設置。

◇故事快進：Enter鍵，左鍵點擊並按住。

◇使用地圖上的道具：
在畫面底部左側顯示的道具圖示順序，與文字鍵上方的數字鍵盤順序相對應，可直接點擊數字鍵使用道具。
你也可以直接通過滑鼠點擊直接使用這些道具。
如果你是使用數字鍵盤移動角色時，則是使用2468鍵。

◇對話場景：
對話視窗的隱藏或顯示：在對話過程中，按shift鍵或右鍵點擊。
請注意，如果你隱藏了視窗，你必須再把對話框叫出來，否則對話將無法繼續進行。

對話快進：按住Enter鍵、左鍵點擊。
對話超速快進：PageDown



◇戰鬥場面：
如果你在進入戰鬥後立即取消，你將可以得到敵人的圖鑑和逃跑的按鍵。
要返回戰鬥的話，可以選擇頂部的'戰鬥'。

◇選擇攻擊目標：
不可以直接用鼠標點擊來指定敵人，請選擇顯示在左下角的敵人的名字。

快進：在戰鬥中，按shift鍵或點擊左上角的音符符號，可使動畫快進。

data.short_description: 一份遺失的古書碎片上記載著這樣的一段話 「當人們忘記『他』時，我們將會在現代看到萬鬼夜行吧......。」 主人公'山櫻夏乃'正試圖關閉因時間流逝而被打開的封印之門。 她身著緊身衣，獨自冒險進入另一個世界。 而她是否能夠保護世界和平？
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Devils' Night Party
data.detailed_description:
◆Features


◇The HCGs range from being penetrated by humans and orcs to being violated by tentacles, plants and fleshy tails.
◇Battle scenes will gradually change according to the enemy's attacks
◇The main character, Natsuno Yamazakura (V.A.: Izumi Mikoshiba), is fully voiced during the battle!
◇Easy to use system including fast forward animation

◆Game Description


This is a typical RPG where you can level up, save money and buy new equipment. The system is very simple. You can use recovery items directly from the item bar on the map…etc.
The enemies are stronger, and the game requires less fighting because the main enjoyment is the sex scenes when you lose.

The game is designed to be very friendly, with enemies in a basic touch-and-fight mode, so you must touch them to start a fight, or you can avoid them carefully.
However, if you start a fight accidentally, there is a high chance that you will lose…And you will watch the great sex scenes!

In battle, the target is constantly being sexually harassed and exhibits different stances.
As the pleasure level increases with sex attacks, the damage taken increases and your HP drops more easily.

When your HP hits 0, you will be penetrated and creampied, but your HP and NP will be restored.
The game will end when your womb is full of semen.

Come and enjoy a great battle show!

◆Operation Instructions


◇Basic Operation:
Arrows and character movement (can be diagonal): arrow keys, left click, WASD keys.
Decision: Z key, Enter key, left click, space bar.
Cancel: X key, right click.

◇Map:
Display menus and status: X key or right click in the map scenes.
You can also adjust the volume and select the difficulty level from the menu options.

You can use the crystals in the village and dungeon to set the sex scenes in battle and other related settings.

◇Story fast forward: Enter key, left click and hold.

◇Using items on the map:
The order of the item icons displayed at the bottom left of the screen corresponds to the order of the numeric keys above the text keys, so you can use the items directly by clicking on the numeric keys.
You can also use these items directly by clicking on them with your mouse.

If you are using the numeric keypad to move your character, please use the 2468 keys.

◇Conversation:
To hide or show the conversation window: During a conversation, press the shift key or right-click.
Please note that if you hide the window, the conversation will not continue until you click the conversation window open again.

Dialogue fast forward: Press and hold the Enter key, left click.
Dialogue super fast forward: PageDown



◇Battle scenes:
If you cancel immediately after entering a battle, you will get the enemy's icon and the escape button.
To return to the battle, select 'Battle' at the top.

◇Select an attack target:
Instead of selecting an enemy by clicking directly with the mouse, select the enemy's name displayed in the bottom left corner.
Fast forward: During battle, press shift or click on the note symbol in the top left corner to fast forward the animation.

data.short_description: "When people forget 'him', we'll probably see a million devils partying in modern times..." So said a fragment of a lost ancient document...Could Natsuno Yamazakura protects the world’s peace?
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
